signals.text: No client-facing call or meeting in over 5 months - last Glyphic call was Oct 25, 2024
Early churn risk flagged in Feb 2026 internal meetings - 'self-care potentially canceling' despite contract through October
Early termination email sent before handoff call per Granola notes - classified as churn risk alongside Fond Bone Broth
No winning funnel found - performance challenges noted in internal reviews
No upcoming calls scheduled with Veracity Selfcare on Pulkit's calendar
Contract runs through October but early exit discussion already underway
No retention call or client-facing meeting appears to have taken place after churn risk identification

calls.analysis: Veracity Selfcare has had no calls since October 2024 - over 5 months of silence. The last calls were managed by Devon Kenger and Esteban Alvarez (not current CSM team). Internal Granola meetings flagged Veracity as an early churn risk since February 2026, with an early termination email sent. No retention call or client-facing meeting has occurred since churn was identified.

email.analysis: No direct email communication with Veracity Selfcare brand contacts found. Gmail search returned only Meta ad rejection appeal notifications for Pulkit's own ad account, not related to Veracity. The search term 'Veracity Selfcare' surfaced these due to potential ad account association, but there is zero active email engagement with the brand team. This aligns with the churn risk signals from Granola notes.
